concerns.text: T007 pins seeds only in code/__init__.py but Constitution Principle I requires seeds pinned in code for ALL stochastic operations. Task verification says 'all stochastic operations in code/__init__.py' which is too narrow - seeds must be pinned wherever stochastic operations occur, not just in __init__.py

T019 only documents filtering but SC-012 requires 'System confirms dataset filtering to hyperbolic knots completed with documented exclusion count matching excluded_knots.md'. Task lacks explicit verification that filtering was actually performed, not just logged

T040 validates hyperbolic volume against KnotInfo but omits FR-013's ≥90% match threshold requirement. Task should explicitly include '≥90% match against KnotInfo reference values' to preserve the acceptance criterion

T030b implements tie-breaking validation script but SC-007 explicitly requires 'script must return a success exit code on consistency check'. Task omits this verification criterion - dropped acceptance criterion

T065/T066 implement custom citation/content hashing frameworks but Constitution Principles II/V specify Reference-Validator Agent and Advancement-Evaluator Agent handle these. Custom implementation may violate constitution's agent-based verification architecture

No task addresses Constitution Principle VI (Mathematical Invariant Consistency): 'Every computed knot invariant MUST be verified against established definitions from primary mathematical literature before inclusion'. This is a dropped constitutional requirement
File path mismatch: plan.md specifies code/download/knot_atlas_loader.py but T013 uses code/download/knot_atlas_downloader.py. Consistency issue that may cause implementation confusion
